title: Cobbleworkers
description: Pasture block can now be used as a utility block that gives Pokémon jobs!
body:
Cobbleworkers is a companion server-side mod for Cobblemon that turns the **Pasture Block** into a powerful utility block.

## Overview

Visit the mod's documentation [on this link](https://docs.accieo.com/cobbleworkers/).

## Datapack support

This mod supports the creation of jobs via datapacks. You can explore the the built-in datapacks and create your own [on this link](https://tools.accieo.com)

## Disclaimer

Remember to back up your world before installing!

## Support

Using cobbleworkers in a server? Consider [supporting development](https://ko-fi.com/accieo) with a one time donation!
